title: ladanum intermedium
intro: Ladanum intermedium, also known as rockrose, is a plant species in the Cistaceae family that produces a fragrant resin. The medicinal properties of Ladanum intermedium are attributed to its resin, which contains cistin and other bioactive compounds, and has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ladanum intermedium include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Ladanum intermedium can be prepared as a tincture, essential oil, or salve, and is often used in aromatherapy and herbal remedies for its therapeutic properties.
